channel.title: BBC Weather - Forecast for Cardiff, GB

image.title: BBC Weather - Forecast for Cardiff, GB

item.title: Tonight: Clear Sky, Minimum Temperature: 15°C (59°F)
item.description: Minimum Temperature: 15°C (59°F), Wind Direction: north-easterly, Wind Speed: 10mph, Visibility: Very Good, Pressure: 1022mb, Humidity: 58%, UV Risk: 5, Pollution: Low, Sunset: 21:24 BST

item.title: Thursday: Sunny, Minimum Temperature: 15°C (60°F) Maximum Temperature: 29°C (85°F)
item.description: Maximum Temperature: 29°C (85°F), Minimum Temperature: 15°C (60°F), Wind Direction: north-easterly, Wind Speed: 11mph, Visibility: Very Good, Pressure: 1021mb, Humidity: 51%, UV Risk: 7, Pollution: Low, Sunrise: 05:14 BST, Sunset: 21:23 BST

item.title: Friday: Sunny, Minimum Temperature: 15°C (58°F) Maximum Temperature: 28°C (82°F)
item.description: Maximum Temperature: 28°C (82°F), Minimum Temperature: 15°C (58°F), Wind Direction: north-easterly, Wind Speed: 6mph, Visibility: Very Good, Pressure: 1018mb, Humidity: 49%, UV Risk: 7, Pollution: Low, Sunrise: 05:15 BST, Sunset: 21:22 BST
